task_completion.description: Create an Autopsy case named 'Encrypted_Triage_2024' with case number 'INV-ENC-009'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Autopsy GUI showing the active case name 'Encrypted_Triage_2024' and case number 'INV-ENC-009' in the title bar, case properties, or dashboard.

task_completion.description: Add the suspect USB disk image to the Autopsy case.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Autopsy GUI showing 'suspect_usb.dd' listed under the Data Sources tree on the left panel.

task_completion.description: Identify and tag the encrypted archive as 'ENCRYPTED_CONTRABAND'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Autopsy GUI showing a ZIP file selected with a tag applied named 'ENCRYPTED_CONTRABAND', visible in the Tags section of the tree or the result viewer.

task_completion.description: Export the ZIP file to the exported_archives directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal or File Manager showing a ZIP file present in the '/home/ga/Reports/exported_archives/' directory.

task_completion.description: Recover the ZIP password using the provided password list and extract the files to the uncovered_evidence directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal showing a password cracking tool (e.g., fcrackzip, john, or a script) successfully finding the password using 'suspect_passwords.txt', AND terminal or file manager showing the extracted files inside '/home/ga/Reports/uncovered_evidence/'.

task_completion.description: Generate a findings report at decryption_report.txt with the required sections.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal output (e.g., cat) displaying the contents of '/home/ga/Reports/decryption_report.txt'. The content must include 'ARCHIVE_NAME:', 'CRACKED_PASSWORD:', and 'EXTRACTED_FILES:' followed by the actual discovered values.

integrity.description: The agent used the actual Autopsy GUI to analyze the evidence and tag the file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the authentic Autopsy application interface being interacted with, not just command-line sleight of hand or text files mimicking Autopsy databases.

integrity.description: The agent performed actual password cracking using the provided dictionary.
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal history or active commands showing the use of an extraction/cracking tool referencing '/home/ga/evidence/suspect_passwords.txt'.

integrity.description: The report contains actual discovered values, not placeholders.
integrity.visual_evidence: The decryption_report.txt file shows concrete filenames and a specific cracked password, rather than the literal placeholder text '<name_of_the_zip_file>' or '<the_successful_password>' from the prompt.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Case Name: Encrypted_Triage_2024. Case Number: INV-ENC-009. Evidence Image: /home/ga/evidence/suspect_usb.dd. Passwords File: /home/ga/evidence/suspect_passwords.txt. Export Directory: /home/ga/Reports/exported_archives. Uncovered Evidence Directory: /home/ga/Reports/uncovered_evidence. Report File: /home/ga/Reports/decryption_report.txt.
